parents.subject: LU-18939 llite: fix readahead pct to use totalram

commit.subject: LU-17000 lnet: Fix Data race when accessing lp_state (2)
commit.message:
LU-17000 lnet: Fix Data race when accessing lp_state (2)

Fix Data race when accessing lp_state. lp_state in
other places in the code is accessed within lp_lock.

CoverityID: 490759 ("Data race condition")
Test-Parameters: trivial testlist=sanity-lnet
Signed-off-by: Arshad Hussain <arshad.hussain@aeoncomputing.com>
Change-Id: I9ae16fae132dcfc0149c3b6fe899ae20bfa7fc9a
